name: Amphenol Corp.
lede: Amphenol runs five capability centers across five Indian cities. Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Ghaziabad and Chennai, covering CoE, manufacturing and sales & marketing, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amphenol office in India. We map five, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amphenol Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amphenol runs 5 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Ghaziabad, Chennai), covering CoE, manufacturing and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Amphenol's India footprint covers Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Ghaziabad and Chennai, spanning CoE, manufacturing and sales & marketing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Amphenol operate in India?
faq.a: Amphenol operates 5 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amphenol have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Amphenol's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Ghaziabad and Chennai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Amphenol run in India?
faq.a: Amphenol runs CoE, manufacturing and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amphenol's India GCCs?
faq.a: Amphenol's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amphenol's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 3 leaders at Amphenol's India centers, across Finance and IT. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
